title: Assignment versus comparison
explanation: A single equals sign assigns a value. Two equals signs compare values.
remedy: Practise conditions that compare numbers and strings.

title: Off-by-one indexing
pattern: Using len(items) as a valid final index
explanation: The final valid list index is len(items) - 1.
remedy: Prefer direct iteration when an index is not required.

title: Missing values are not automatically zero
pattern: Replacing every missing numeric value with 0 without justification
explanation: Zero may represent a real observed value, while missing means unknown.
remedy: Document the business meaning before imputing.

title: WHERE versus HAVING
pattern: Using WHERE to filter an aggregate result
explanation: WHERE filters rows before aggregation. HAVING filters grouped results.
remedy: Practise filtering SUM and COUNT results.

title: Catching every exception
explanation: Bare except can hide programming defects and system interruptions.

title: Test-set leakage
pattern: Using test results repeatedly to tune the model
explanation: The test set should approximate unseen performance, not guide every tuning decision.
